diagnoses_icd.long_title: Septicemia due to escherichia coli [E. coli]
Acute kidney failure with lesion of tubular necrosis
Acute and subacute necrosis of liver
Autistic disorder, current or active state
Other anomalies of gallbladder, bile ducts, and liver
Personal history of sudden cardiac arrest
Unspecified disorder of kidney and ureter
Hypertensive chronic kidney disease, unspecified, with chronic kidney disease stage I through stage IV, or unspecified
Nephritis and nephropathy, not specified as acute or chronic, with other specified pathological lesion in kidney

procedures_icd.long_title: Continuous invasive mechanical ventilation for less than 96 consecutive hours
Central venous catheter placement with guidance
Endoscopic insertion of stent (tube) into bile duct

drg_codes.description: SEPTICEMIA OR SEVERE SEPSIS W/O MV 96+ HOURS W MCC

labevents.label: Blue Top Hold
labevents.value: HOLD.  DISCARD GREATER THAN 24 HRS OLD.

microbiologyevents.comments: >25 PMNs and <10 epithelial cells/100X field.  NO MICROORGANISMS SEEN.
